title: TASK-1: Mobile Assessment Routes Are Not Defined
description:
Problem: The assessment feature navigates to 6 routes (/student/assessments/attempt, /start, /detail, /result, etc.) not defined in AppRoutePaths or AppRouter.onGenerateRoute. The default case sends users to SplashPage, so the entire assessment flow silently fails.

Location: apps/mobile/lib/core/routing/app_route_paths.dart, apps/mobile/lib/core/routing/app_router.dart:37-68, apps/mobile/lib/features/assessments/ui/pages/*.dart

What to do: 1) Add all assessment route paths to AppRoutePaths 2) Add cases to AppRouter.onGenerateRoute switch for each assessment page 3) Add routes to _protectedRoutes set
label: bug

title: TASK-2: Admin Dashboard Links to Nonexistent Pages
description:
Problem: Homepage links to /admin/deadlines and /admin/assessment-results but neither page directory exists under app/admin/. Users get 404.

Location: apps/admin-dashboard/app/admin/page.tsx:47 (/admin/deadlines), apps/admin-dashboard/app/admin/page.tsx:55 (/admin/assessment-results)

What to do: 1) Create apps/admin-dashboard/app/admin/deadlines/page.tsx 2) Create apps/admin-dashboard/app/admin/assessment-results/page.tsx 3) Or remove links from QUICK_LINK_GROUPS until pages are built
label: bug

title: TASK-3: Student-Web API Path Mismatch With Backend
description:
Problem: Student-web prefixes all API calls with /api/ (e.g. /api/auth/login, /api/profile) but NestJS backend has no global prefix. Auth controller is @Controller('auth') not @Controller('api/auth'). Every API call from student-web will 404.

Location: apps/student-web/src/features/auth/AuthContext.tsx:20,27, services/backend-api/src/main.ts (no setGlobalPrefix), services/backend-api/src/auth/auth.controller.ts:24

What to do: Either add app.setGlobalPrefix('api') in backend main.ts, or remove /api prefix from all student-web endpoint paths
label: bug

title: TASK-4: Student-Web Auth Has No Token Persistence
description:
Problem: ApiClient stores accessToken in memory only. On page refresh the token is lost and users are logged out. setAccessToken() exists but is never called after login.

Location: apps/student-web/src/api/client.ts:6,12-14, apps/student-web/src/features/auth/AuthContext.tsx:26-29

What to do: 1) Call apiClient.setAccessToken(token) in login flow 2) Persist token to localStorage in setAccessToken 3) Load token from localStorage on ApiClient init 4) Clear on logout
label: bug

title: TASK-5: AIM Engine Pipeline Methods Are All Stubs
description:
Problem: All 6 analysis methods in the pipeline return None and discard inputs with del session, attempts. The /aim/v1/analysis endpoint logs start/complete but produces no output. Engine is non-functional.

Location: services/aim-engine/app/pipeline/aim_analysis_pipeline.py:193-289 (_analyze_skill_state, _analyze_weakness_records, _decide_difficulty, _generate_recommendations, _compute_review_schedule, _summarize_session)

What to do: Wire each stub to domain services in services/api/src/aim/domain/services/: skill_state->mastery_calculator, weakness->weakness_detector, difficulty->difficulty_adapter, recommendations->recommendation_engine, review->retention_tracker, session->emotional_state_detector. Depends on TASK-6.
label: improvement

title: TASK-6: packages/ai_core Has Broken Import Paths and Is Never Used
description:
Problem: __init__.py adds Path(__file__).parents[1] / 'src' to sys.path which resolves to a nonexistent directory. Actual implementations are in services/api/src/aim/domain/services/. No file in the codebase imports from ai_core or packages.ml. Same issue in packages/ml/.

Location: packages/ai_core/__init__.py:7-10, packages/ml/__init__.py:7-10, all 15 files in packages/ai_core/ and 4 in packages/ml/

What to do: Fix import path to point to services/api/src/, or delete these packages and import domain services directly in aim-engine
label: improvement

title: TASK-7: Web App Admin/Parent Routes Have No Auth Protection
description:
Problem: Route selection in apps/web uses window.location.pathname with no auth check. Anyone can visit /admin, /debug, /admin-dashboard, /parent without logging in.

Location: apps/web/src/app/App.js:29-35 (admin routes), apps/web/src/app/App.js:37-39 (parent routes)

What to do: 1) Check auth state before rendering admin/parent components 2) Redirect unauthenticated users to login 3) Verify admin role for admin routes
label: bug

title: TASK-8: Web App Parent Dashboard Is a Hardcoded Empty Stub
description:
Problem: ParentDashboard hardcodes status to 'empty' via useState('empty') and never fetches any data. Always renders empty state.

Location: apps/web/src/pages/ParentDashboard.jsx:6

What to do: 1) Fetch real parent dashboard data from backend API on mount 2) Update status based on API response 3) Render actual child progress data when available
label: improvement

title: TASK-9: Minor Code Quality Fixes
description:
Problem: Collection of non-breaking issues: ~60 repository methods in services/backend-api/src/features/ access result.rows[0] after INSERT without null check. Hardcoded algorithm parameters in mastery_calculator.py:160-164, difficulty_adapter.py:81-107, weakness_detector.py:217-239, retention_tracker.py:20-23. Deprecated auth methods in mobile auth_flow_notifier.dart:21-25. Mock Supabase client silently fails in apps/web supabase/client.js:9-26. Inconsistent API base URL defaults across apps.

Location: Various (see description)

What to do: Address each item individually as incremental improvements
label: quality
